Event: Autumn Festival 2023
Event Date: 01/10/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: T46
Golden Order Totem

Once in a while, a restoration is cast on the totem owner. It removes a random debuff and restores 150000 health. It also increases their damage by 40% and health by 30% for 5 sec.

Requirements: 90
